pending.body:
finding_summary: `try_reconcile_failure()` now fails closed on legitimate paused-then-resumed runs that later fail. The new validation requires the milestone lineage attempt identity to match the latest durable project attempt timestamp, but the lineage layer intentionally keeps the original `started_at` when the same `run_id` is resumed. Because `record_task_run_start()` reuses the existing running row without moving its `started_at`, any resumed failure can trip `reconciliation_metadata_error` and force `NeedsOperator` instead of running failure reconciliation.
severity: high
affected_files:
- `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs:148-168`
- `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs:2042-2095`
- `src/adapters/fs.rs:5065-5090`
remediation_hint: derive the lineage-side attempt identity with the same resume semantics as the project journal/snapshot, or relax the lineage validation for active same-`run_id` rows so paused/resumed attempts are not required to reuse the original `started_at`.

finding_summary: stale failure replays can record the placeholder `superseded by retry...` text instead of the task's real error summary. When a retry starts before the old failure is reconciled, `fail_superseded_running_attempt()` rewrites the old lineage row with that synthetic detail. `recorded_failure_provenance()` then prefers the lineage row over the replayed `error_summary`, so the repaired `BeadFailed` journal event preserves the retry placeholder rather than the actual failure reason required by this bead.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- `src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs:210-244`
- `src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs:674-700`
- `src/adapters/fs.rs:4606-4623`
- `src/adapters/fs.rs:5105-5107`
remediation_hint: when replaying a stale failure, treat `superseded by retry...` lineage details as non-authoritative and prefer the fresh error summary passed into reconciliation, or an existing `BeadFailed` journal payload if one already exists.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 15 -> Plan and Implement
